ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the security */,
  "last_traded_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the security (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry for hierarchical classification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the industry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector for hierarchical classification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sector (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the security */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the price record (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intraday_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intraday price record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the intraday price data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the price record (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intraday_prices_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) of the company */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid by the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow of the company */,
  "balance_sheet" TEXT /* Balance sheet data in JSON format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial report was filed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data (e.g., SEC, company website) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial record (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score for the article (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., published, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, earnings report) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the action */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user performing the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audit record (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
